name: Forseti
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Forseti thing-stead arbiter — law sung in a single, even tone.
flowText: Forseti thing-stead arbiter — law sung in a single, even tone.

related.name: ♎ Libra
related.teaser: Libra is the balance of air — lover’s mirror, scales of harmony, eye of justice.

related.name: XI. Justice
related.teaser: Justice is the shining scale of truth, sword of balance cutting illusion from the real.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: VII. The Chariot
related.teaser: The Chariot drives the soul through waters of life, guided by will and balanced by opposing forces.

related.name: XIII. Death
related.teaser: Death is not an end but a passage — dissolution of form into the dark womb of renewal.

related.name: Five of Swords
related.teaser: Five of Swords is the blade of air — Friction reveals truth; growth through test.

related.name: Two of Swords
related.teaser: Two of Swords is the blade of air — Dual currents finding rhythm.

related.name: Brigid
related.teaser: Brigid is a bedrock of becoming — Hearth; under Sun; in Leo.

related.name: King of Swords
related.teaser: King of Swords is the blade of air — Set order and direction; steward the realm.

related.name: ᛖ Ehwaz
related.teaser: Ehwaz is the two-as-one stride — trust that doubles distance.
